title: hieracium rigidum subsp. tridentatum
intro: Hieracium rigidum subsp. tridentatum, also known as hawkweed, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and improve liver function, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hieracium rigidum subsp. tridentatum include reducing inflammation, improving liver health, and supporting digestion, which can help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as liver disease and digestive disorders. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to support liver health and digestion.
